meta.name: Still: A Minecraft Series
meta.description: Produced by SEEN Studio. 'Still' is an immersive Minecraft series following an epic journey.

videos.title: Episode 0: The Examination
videos.overview: As they started thinking about filming their game play together, they gatheround and start's talking about what are they going to do next, but something odd they were never expecting just happened.

videos.title: Episode 1: An Unexpected arrival
videos.overview: As Vex traveled to the STILL place and Anas mysteriously disappeared, his friends were searching for him and eventually they found him but only to find out the real truth they were never expecting.

videos.title: Episode 2: (Coming Soon)
videos.overview: This episode is currently underwork by SEEN Studio. Stay tuned for the release!
